stemHtml: The accuracy of the, manually calculated, DR-position of an aircraft is, among other things, affected by:

options.a: the accuracy of the actual wind.
options.b: the accuracy of the forecasted wind.
options.c: the accuracy of the adjustment of the position lines for the motion of the aircraft between the last fix and the DR-position.
options.d: the accuracy of the adjustment of the position lines for the motion of the aircraft between the last and the new DR-position.
